response.justification: The candidate lacks demonstrated experience in AI strategy, cloud platform development, or building AI-powered products at scale, despite 15+ years of general software engineering experience; their work centers on web/mobile apps, GIS tools, and open-source libraries with minimal evidence of AI/ML implementation or cloud infrastructure leadership required for the role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack engineering experience across multiple languages and domains
Proven track record of open-source contributions and developer tooling (e.g., Fluent-Asserts, GISCollective)
Strong background in DevOps, CI/CD, and infrastructure setup (Docker, GitLab, Kubernetes)
concerns: No evidence of building or deploying AI/ML models or AI-powered platforms
Lacks demonstrable cloud product strategy or customer advisory experience in AI/cloud contexts
AI-related work mentioned (MCP agents) is superficially referenced without technical depth or outcomes
